subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1910-11-24
subcodes.first_line: In all circumstances, Iran shall prosper; verily, the success and triumph of Iran is foreordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایران در هر صورت خوب میشود فلاح و نجاح ایران مقرر است
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @praise of Eastern values; culture
